character.definition: name of a place in ancient times
name of a ship, a sailing boat
(same as 茭) Zizania latifolia, a kind of edible aquatic grass, rootstock (of the lotus), the joint of the sides of arms and the end of a bow
sharp teeth; to break something hard like a knife, sand (in food), ugly
(Cant.) to suddenly fall or drop down
to be rude to, to annoy, to profane; to trouble, to harass
